testcase.name: Three-arg constructor sets color correctly
Three-arg constructor sets width correctly
Square special case: equal width and height are stored correctly
toString contains the color value
toString contains the width value
setWidth to zero is accepted by the setter
getColor returns the color set at construction
getWidth returns the current width
toString is not null or empty
Width survives multiple consecutive setWidth calls
Three-arg constructor sets height correctly
toString contains the height value
setHeight to zero is accepted by the setter
setHeight to a very large value is stored correctly
setWidth to a very large value is stored correctly
Two-arg constructor sets width correctly
setHeight updates the height
getHeight returns the current height
Two-arg constructor defaults color to black
Rectangle is a subclass of Shape
setWidth and setHeight are independent of each other
Two-arg constructor sets height correctly
Height survives multiple consecutive setHeight calls
setWidth updates the width
